content.en:
In the universe, there is a place called Xuanyun Sea, which is the territory where the Xuanyuan Clan, the great clan of the universe, is located.

However, the Xuanyuan Clan is just an ordinary cosmic clan, there are only six Supremes at present, and the number of Heavenly Venerables is only thirteen, far inferior to the human race.

But the life of the Xuanyuan clan is very good, so the Xuanyun clan is good at formations, and almost builds the star field of the Xuanyuan clan like a forbidden land, even the supremes of other universe clans dare not step into the territory of the Xuanyuan clan, if Tianzun enters, once he shows hostility, he will definitely die.

Because of this, the Xuanyuan clan is very mysterious in the outside world, and no cosmic clan dares to pay attention to the Xuanyuan clan.

this day.

Outside the territory of the Xuanyuan clan, a figure appeared, it was Ye Tian.

His target this time was Xuan Yuanhai.

"Xuanyuan Hai, it is rumored that there is a large amount of Chaos Yuan Qi there, which is very pure, and there have been some geniuses in the history of the Xuanyuan Clan who specialize in cultivating the Chaos Dao, but it is a pity that the progress of each one is very slow, and none of them have stepped into the Supreme Level. It is very likely that the Xuanyuan Sea will meet my request to impact the half-step Chaos Life Body, if that is the case, I can discuss with the Xuanyuan Clan and borrow their Xuanyuan Sea!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Foreigners who want to enter the Xuanyuan clan under normal circumstances will definitely not be allowed.

But if you just visit the Xuanyuan Clan, the Xuanyuan Clan will not refuse, after all, the Human Race is far away from the Xuanyuan Clan, and the two sides have no interests.

Moreover, Ye Tian is only the master at present, and the Xuanyuan clan will not be afraid of Ye Tian.

"The master of the human race, I have come to visit the Xuanyuan clan!"

Ye Tian's voice came to the Xuanyuan Clan's Domain Protection Array, and was naturally heard by Tianzun, who was monitoring the Domain Protection Array.

Wow!

A Tianzun of the Xuanyuan clan appeared.

"It turned out to be the master of ten thousand laws, I don't know what happened to my Xuanyuan clan?"

Xuanyuan Tianzun asked.

Ye Tian recognized this Tianzun and said with a smile: "Purple Mountain Tianzun, I have traveled to the universe and been here, and I heard that the Xuanyuan Sea of the Xuanyuan Clan is a Chaos Treasure Land, and I happen to be cultivating the Chaos Dao, so I want to go to the Xuanyuan Sea to see it, maybe I have some understanding! I don't know if the Xuanyuan Clan is convenient?"

"This ......"

Purple Mountain Tianzun frowned slightly.

If it was an ordinary person, he would have directly refused, but Ye Tian was not an ordinary person, but a genius on the first day of the universe, even if he was the master of the ultimate cultivation, his combat power might be even more powerful than him.

If such a big man becomes a supreme in the future, at least he is at the level of the first god master, or even surpasses the first god master, which is comparable to the existence of the lord of the Yuan Gu.

Therefore, he didn't dare to offend Ye Tian.

"Master of Ten Thousand Laws, I will report to the supreme of the clan, and please wait a while. "

Purple Mountain Tianzun said apologetically.

"Yes!"

Ye Tian nodded.

Soon, the Purple Mountain Heavenly Venerable received a reply from the supremes of the clan.

"Master of Ten Thousand Laws, the supremes of the clan can let you go to Xuanyuan Sea to observe, but the time can't be long, ten days is the most. In addition, I will need to accompany me on this trip. The Master of Ten Thousand Laws should have also heard of the rules of our Xuanyuan Clan, and I hope you will forgive me!"

Purple Mountain Tianzun Dao.

"No problem!"

Ye Tian was not angry at all, the Xuanyuan Clan was able to let him enter the Xuanyuan Clan's territory for ten days, he felt very surprised.

Moreover, he does not need ten days, a few hours are enough.

"Master of Ten Thousand Laws, please come in!"

The Purple Mountain Heavenly Venerable opened a small portal on the Great Domain Protection Array, Dao.

"Thank you!"

Ye Tian followed the Purple Mountain Tianzun to officially step into the star field of the Xuanyuan Clan and go to the Xuanyuan Sea.

Soon.

The two came to Xuanyuanhai.

......

Xuanyuanhai is almost regarded as the holy land of the Xuanyuan clan, and many geniuses and powerhouses above the cosmic god of Xuanyuanhai are practicing here.

And the arrival of Ye Tian and Zishan Tianzun attracted the attention of many Xuanyuan clansmen.

"Foreigners!"

Ye Tian was recognized.

Many people were very curious about Ye Tian's identity, and he was able to come to Xuanyuan Sea as a foreigner.

"Master of Ten Thousand Laws, this is the Xuanyuan Sea of our Xuanyuan Clan!"

Purple Mountain Tianzun Dao.

"It's amazing!"

Ye Tian glanced at it and said.

Immediately, he used his secret technique to investigate the concentration of Xuanyuan Sea's chaotic vitality and probe the chaotic origin aura, but unfortunately he didn't find it.

"Hey, the concentration of Chaos Yuan Qi is still much worse, although it is a treasure land, it does not meet my requirements, and it can't allow me to condense a half-step Chaos Life Body here!"

Ye Tian sighed secretly.

Of course.

Even if it didn't help him here, he couldn't just come and leave, otherwise it would be too suspicious.

So, Ye Tian stayed here for ten days, mainly walking around.

And soon, many geniuses of Xuanyuan Sea learned that the universe had only come here on the first day, and they wanted to challenge Ye Tian one by one, but they were reprimanded by the Tianzun of the Xuanyuan clan one by one.

Ten days later.

Ye Tian left the Xuanyuan clan.

After Ye Tian left, a person appeared next to the Purple Mountain Tianzun, who was one of the supremes of the Xuanyuan clan, the Half Moon Zun!

"Purple Mountain Tianzun, what do you think is the purpose of the Ten Thousand Laws of the Human Race to come to our Xuanyuan Clan?"

Ban Zhizun asked.

"It's definitely not just to see Xuan Yuanhai, maybe he wants to find an opportunity, but it is estimated that he hasn't found an opportunity that belongs to him!" Zishan Tianzun guessed.

"Yes, the Master of Ten Thousand Laws is very mysterious, and his achievements in the Chaos Avenue are very high, but it's a pity that he is not from our Xuanyuan clan!"

Half Moonshine sighed.

----------

After leaving the Xuanyuan Clan, Ye Tian went to the second place, which was one of the ten forbidden domains of the universe - the Demon Ruins.

The Chaos Demon Ruins are full of Chaos Yuan Qi and a terrifying Demon Qi, which is very dangerous, even the Supreme may fall, Ye Tian relied on having the Life Heavenly Pupil, so he dared to break into this forbidden place.

But even so, Ye Tian was very embarrassed in the Demon Ruins, but in the end, he confirmed that the Demon Ruins were not the treasure he wanted, but like a Jedi.

"There's only one last place left, and I don't want to go there if I don't have to!"

Ye Tian muttered.

That place is called the Chaos Courtyard, and it is also the largest Chaos Ancient Well in the universe.

In the universe, some chaotic ancient wells are often born, which contain a large amount of chaotic vitality and some treasures, which can be called a world.

Whenever some high-level Chaos Ancient Wells appeared, it would cause some powerful Supremes to fight, such as Kunwu Supreme and others who had also fought for high-level Chaos Ancient Wells to grab resources.

There was also a chaotic ancient well on the earth, which was located in the Metaverse, but that Metaverse was a Metaverse that was forcibly opened, and its lifespan was limited, and it was completely shattered after opening it once.

At the beginning, he also saw the Chaos Ancient Well, but the original Chaos Ancient Well was only the lowest level of the Incomplete Chaos Ancient Well, even so, he didn't dare to enter the Chaos Ancient Well at that time, otherwise he would definitely die.

And the Protoss also occupies a majestic Metaverse, has the largest Chaos Ancient Well, and continuously cultivates a son of the universe.

At the beginning, for the sake of that Metaverse, the Protoss fought with many cosmic clans and super clans and demon clans, and even lost many supremes before snatching down this Metaverse and the chaotic ancient well.

Therefore, it was very difficult to get close to that Chaos Ancient Well, let alone enter it.

"The chaotic vitality inside the Chaos Ancient Well is almost extremely rich, even much richer than the chaotic vitality in the outside world, and it is the most likely to form the chaotic origin aura. It's a pity that the Metaverse and the Chaos Ancient Well are occupied by the Protoss, and if you want to enter it, you must go through the consent of the Protoss!"

Ye Tian frowned.

He was pondering how to make a deal with the Protoss and get the Protoss to agree to let him enter the Chaos Well.

"Why don't you do that?"

Ye Tian thought of a way.
